It doesn't.

The real cost is invisible, untracked, and compounding every sprint.

Checkout flows are the most expensive tests to maintain in any product suite.

Not because they're complex. Because they change constantly.

Dynamic, real-world sites break traditional test suites.

Ads loading mid-test. Widgets updating in real time. Content shifting between sprints.

Most teams respond by adding a QA engineer to babysit the suite.

Web testing: one framework, one toolchain.

Mobile testing: another framework, another toolchain, sometimes another hire.

Search. Navigate. Verify. The stuff that should take minutes but requires constant upkeep when your product moves fast.

迪士尼雪宝 Olaf 机器人

Olaf 机器人的技术栈：

硬件：肚子里装了 Jetson 计算机（NVIDIA 的边缘 AI 芯片）

训练：在 Omniverse（NVIDIA的虚拟仿真平台）里学会走路，先在虚拟世界跑通，再迁移到真实机器人

物理引擎：Newton 求解器，运行在 NVIDIA Warp 上（一个 Python物理模拟框架），跟 Disney https://t.co/AhxZhHggXc

其实新时代的操作系统里已经容不下这些老古董了
